mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO biomed_sample ( sample_no, sample_type_id, queue, collect_time, source, storage_id, create_by, create_time, update_time, sample_name, status ) VALUES
( #{item.sampleNo}, #{item.sampleTypeId}, #{item.queue}, #{item.collectTime}, #{item.source}, #{item.storageId}, #{item.createBy}, NOW(), NOW(), #{item.sampleName}, IFNULL(#{item.status}, 0) )
